use_cases: Displaying status labels such as Active, Pending, or Draft in application interfaces
Tagging content with categorical labels or keywords for organization
Showing notification counts or alerts in navigation headers
Indicating user roles, permissions, or account types
Marking products or content as Featured, New, or On Sale
ai_summary: A reusable badge component with CVA-based variant support for displaying status labels, tags, and categorical information. Features pill-shaped styling with default, secondary, destructive, and outline variants. Designed as a lightweight atomic component suitable for use across any industry or platform.
